item.title: Machining Down a Large 1045 Hollow Bar for the Megabore Tailstock Chuck
item.description: Big machines demand big parts. This clip shows the machining of a massive 1045 hollow bar, shaping it into a critical piece for the Megabore tailstock chuck.

media:content.media:title: Machining Down a Large 1045 Hollow Bar for the Megabore Tailstock Chuck
media:content.media:description: Big machines demand big parts. This clip shows the machining of a massive 1045 hollow bar, shaping it into a critical piece for the Megabore tailstock chuck.

item.title: CAT 24M End Caps — Threads, Seal Grooves & Nitrogen Fittings
item.description: Every fine detail matters. Threads, seal grooves, and precision drilling come together to finish new CAT 24M end caps — tapped and ready for nitrogen charge fittings.

media:content.media:title: CAT 24M End Caps — Threads, Seal Grooves & Nitrogen Fittings
media:content.media:description: Every fine detail matters. Threads, seal grooves, and precision drilling come together to finish new CAT 24M end caps — tapped and ready for nitrogen charge fittings.

item.title: A Close Look at a Brown Snake in the Yard
item.description: Not all visitors are welcome in the yard. This clip takes a careful look at a brown snake encounter — a reminder of how close wildlife can get to daily life.

media:content.media:title: A Close Look at a Brown Snake in the Yard
media:content.media:description: Not all visitors are welcome in the yard. This clip takes a careful look at a brown snake encounter — a reminder of how close wildlife can get to daily life.

item.title: Line Boring and Bore Welding in Action
item.description: Precision meets power as line boring and bore welding restore worn components back to spec. Watch the process unfold step by step in the workshop.

media:content.media:title: Line Boring and Bore Welding in Action
media:content.media:description: Precision meets power as line boring and bore welding restore worn components back to spec. Watch the process unfold step by step in the workshop.

item.title: John Deere Grader Blade Change
item.description: Swapping out a grader blade might look straightforward, but it’s a job that demands precision and muscle. Watch as the John Deere grader gets a fresh blade and is made ready for the next round of heavy work.

media:content.media:title: John Deere Grader Blade Change
media:content.media:description: Swapping out a grader blade might look straightforward, but it’s a job that demands precision and muscle. Watch as the John Deere grader gets a fresh blade and is made ready for the next round of heavy work.

item.title: Inspecting a Grader Cylinder Trunnion Crack
item.description: A grader’s hydraulic cylinder trunnion shows signs of cracking — and inspection reveals just how serious the damage is. This video takes you inside the process of identifying the fault and considering the repair options.

media:content.media:title: Inspecting a Grader Cylinder Trunnion Crack
media:content.media:description: A grader’s hydraulic cylinder trunnion shows signs of cracking — and inspection reveals just how serious the damage is. This video takes you inside the process of identifying the fault and considering the repair options.
